_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of descriptive statistics, including measures of central tendency, dispersion, distribution shape, and correlation, and how to interpret each in a business context.
comments: NICE skill intersects with WIDAI AB domain. Knowledge AB-K-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-A-002 (AB, cosine: 0.467), AB-A-003 (AB, cosine: 0.462).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.3/10 (raw 0.634). Shared vocabulary: [descriptive, statistics]. NICE-only terms [applying, skill] vs WIDAI-only terms [business, central, context, correlation, dispersion, distribution] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.893 (P=0.933, R=0.857). P exceeds R by 0.076 — the NICE element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Skill in applying descriptive statistics" and "Knowledge of descriptive statistics, including measures of central tendency, dis" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.619 ≈ STS 0.634 (gap 0.015). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [descriptive, statistics] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.0%. Shared tokens: [descriptive, statistics]. NICE-only: [applying, skill]. WIDAI-only: [business, central, context, correlation, dispersion, distribution].
